title: lasianthus jangarunii
intro: Lasianthus jangarunii, also known as the Thai lasianthus, is a plant species in the family Theaceae, native to Thailand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of Lasianthus jangarunii have been reported to exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin irritation. The plant's leaves can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed in traditional Thai medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
